title: Election 2026 LIVE: Amit Shah slams Mamata over women’s safety in West Bengal; Rahul calls Assam CM ‘most corrupt’
description: Election 2026 LIVE: Union home minister Amit Shah slammed West Bengal CM over her 'failure' to ensure women's safety in the state. Meanwhile, TMC leader Yusuf Pathan said that SIR is udermining the voting rights of the citizens, while also praising CM's efforts for fighting for people's rights.
